Comment: EventBridge rule that triggers the CostRadar Lambda daily at 08:00 UTC. Deploy with: aws events put-rule --cli-input-json file://eventbridge_rule.json
Name: costradar-daily-detection
Description: Triggers CostRadar anomaly detection, forecasting, and rightsizing evaluation every day at 08:00 UTC

IAMRole.Comment: Create this role and attach it to the rule so EventBridge can invoke Lambda

RequiredLambdaPermission.Comment: Add this resource-based policy to the Lambda so EventBridge can invoke it
